mapper.select: select * from agent_info where site_code = #{siteCode} and LOWER(agent_account) = LOWER(#{agentAccount})
select agent_account from agent_info where site_code = #{siteCode} and agent_account like concat ('%' #{agentAccount},'%')

select a.id as id, a.agent_id agentId, a.parent_id parentId, a.path as path, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.level as level, a.register_time registerTime from agent_info a join agent_info_relation b on a.agent_id=b.descendant_agent_id where b.ancestor_agent_id= #{id}

SELECT t3.short_url shortUrl, t3.agent_account agentAccount, t3.updated_time as operatorTime from agent_info t3
t3.short_url is not null and t3.short_url <> ''
AND t3.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount}
AND t3.short_url like concat('%', #{vo.shortUrl}, '%')

SELECT a.id id, a.site_code siteCode, a.parent_id parentId, a.agent_id agentId, a.path path, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.level level, a.register_time registerTime FROM agent_info a where 1=1
and a.site_code=#{siteCode}

if.if: AND a.agent_id in(SELECT descendant_agent_id from agent_info_relation where ancestor_agent_id=#{vo.agentId})

mapper.select:
SELECT a.id id, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.invite_code inviteCode, a.agent_attribution agentAttribution, a.level level, a.plan_code planCode, acp.plan_name planName, a.parent_id parentId, a.agent_category agentCategory, a.agent_type agentType, a.status status, a.risk_level_id riskLevelId, a.agent_label_id agentLabelId, a.register_way registerWay, IFNULL(b.available_amount, 0) commissionWalletBalance, IFNULL(c.available_amount, 0) quotaWalletBalance, a.register_time registerTime, a.last_login_time lastLoginTime, a.agent_white_list agentWhiteList, a.merchant_account merchantAccount, a.merchant_name merchantName FROM agent_info a left join agent_commission_coin b on a.agent_id = b.agent_id left join agent_quota_coin c on a.agent_id = c.agent_id join agent_commission_plan acp on acp.plan_code = a.plan_code
ORDER BY registerTime asc
ORDER BY registerTime desc
ORDER BY a.register_time DESC, a.last_login_time DESC

SELECT a.id id, a.agent_id agentId, a.agent_account agentAccount, a.level, IFNULL(b.available_amount, 0) commissionWalletBalance, IFNULL(c.available_amount, 0) quotaWalletBalance FROM agent_info a left join agent_commission_coin b on a.agent_id = b.agent_id left join agent_quota_coin c on a.agent_id = c.agent_id join agent_info_relation ar on a.agent_id=ar.descendant_agent_id
join agent_commission_plan acp on acp.plan_code = a.plan_code

SELECT count(1) FROM agent_info a join agent_info_relation ar on a.agent_id=ar.descendant_agent_id
join agent_commission_plan acp on acp.plan_code = a.plan_code
select * from agent_info where agent_id=#{agentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, agent_id agentId, agent_account agentAccount, level , super_remark superRemark from agent_info where agent_id = #{agentId}
select a.* from agent_info a join agent_info_relation b on a.agent_id=b.descendant_agent_id where b.ancestor_agent_id=#{agentId}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM agent_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{labelId}, agent_label_id) > 0
SELECT agent_account as agentAccount, agent_type as agentType FROM agent_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{labelId}, agent_label_id) > 0
select a.agent_id from agent_info a join agent_info_relation b on a.agent_id=b.descendant_agent_id where b.ancestor_agent_id=#{agentId}
select agent_id from agent_info where parent_id = #{agentId}

SELECT t1.agent_id as agentId, t1.agent_account as agentAccount, t1.user_benefit as userBenefit, t1.fb_token as FbToken, t1.fb_pix_id as FbPixId, t1.google_token as GoogleToken, t1.google_pix_id as GooglePixId FROM user_info t, agent_info t1 WHERE t.super_agent_id = t1.agent_id AND t.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT count(id) FROM agent_info WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{labelId}, agent_label_id) > 0
select count(id) from agent_info where site_code = #{siteCode} and merchant_account = #{merchantAccount} and parent_account is NULL
select count(id) from agent_info where site_code = #{siteCode} and merchant_account = #{merchantAccount}

SELECT si.site_code as siteCode, sy.currency_code as currency, si.withdraw_id as withdrawWayId, sy.withdraw_way_i18 as withdrawWayI18 FROM site_withdraw_way si inner JOIN system_withdraw_way sy ON si.withdraw_id=sy.id WHERE si.status=1 and si.site_code=#{siteCode}

SELECT t1.agent_id as agentId, t1.agent_account as agentAccount, t1.user_benefit as userBenefit, t.user_id as userId FROM user_info t, agent_info t1 WHERE t.super_agent_id = t1.agent_id AND t.user_id in
#{u}
